harbors.name: Pensar
harbors.description: Ferry jetty near Sandvik on Pensar island

notes.bookingDeadline: At least 10 min before departure from Granvik; morning trips must be booked by 17:00 the previous evening
notes.granholmen: Deviates at Granholmen if ordered, except on 07:45 and 14:00 Heisala trips
notes.stenholm: Deviates at Stenholm if ordered on Pensar trips
notes.ramsholm: Ramsholm jetty can be used when circumstances require

notes.bookingDeadline: At least 10 min before departure from Granvik; morning trips must be booked by 17:00 the previous evening
notes.granholmen: Deviates at Granholmen if ordered, except on 07:45, 09:50 and 13:30 Heisala trips
notes.stenholm: Deviates at Stenholm if ordered on Pensar trips
